title: I am not my mother's bank balance
subtitle: A release-and-allow statement for separating your financial life from the one you watched being lived.
excerpt: A short energy statement for when you are afraid you are repeating a parent's money story. The release names the fear; the allow names the separate future.
sourceNotes: Adapted from Day 11 of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025). The release-and-allow structure draws on The Money Zone (Rebecca Page, 2024).

practice.whenToUse: Use when fear of repeating a parent's financial pattern is active, or after a moment of recognising their behaviour in your own.

content.text: A short energy statement for the moment you recognise a parent's money pattern in your own behaviour. Say it as soon as you notice the recognition turning to fear.
I am ready to release the fear that I am repeating the family money pattern. I release it now. I release it now. I release it now.
I am ready to align with and allow my own separate financial story. I allow it now. I allow it now. I allow it now.
Say each three times, slow, out loud or in your mind.
Adapted from Day 11 of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025). The release-and-allow structure draws on The Money Zone (Rebecca Page, 2024).
